search_query: time to clear marijuana after one puff
combined_text: How Long To Clean For 1 Puff? "beefeater267New Member Hey, I have a job that does random urine tests. I'm curious as to if anyone had any ideas on how long it would take to pass a urine test under the following conditions: Male, 5'9, 130 lb, SUPER FAST metabolism Haven't smoked in 6 months. So, if 1 puff was taken, any guesses?b
